title: Green Olive Fiesta Crunch
description: A crispy and herbal green olive dish infused with a touch of sweetness to make an indulgent low-carb-friendly Vietnamese snack.

ingredients.name: Green Olives
ingredients.notes: Use high-quality green olives for best flavor.

ingredients.name: Lemon Juice
ingredients.notes: To add a tangy note to balance sweetness.

ingredients.name: Herbs (e.g., Thyme, Rosemary)
ingredients.notes: Fresh herbs for aroma and flavor enhancement.

ingredients.name: Minced Garlic
ingredients.notes: Optional, to add a bit of umami flavor.

instructions: Preheat your oven to 350°F (175°C). Rinse and pit the green olives.
In a small bowl, mix coconut sugar with lemon juice. Stir in minced garlic if using.
Place the olives in a large mixing bowl, pour the sugar mixture over them, toss well until all olives are coated evenly.
Sprinkle fresh herbs on top of the olives and massage gently to ensure herbs stick to the olives.

Heat peanut oil or olive oil in a shallow pan over medium heat. Carefully add the coated green olives and fry for about 2-3 minutes per side until golden brown and crispy, making sure not to overcrowd the pan.
Remove from heat and transfer the fried olives onto paper towels to drain excess oil.
Serve immediately as a snack or store in an airtight container at room temperature for up to a week.
